form.formComment: Filly returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 12 at this track November 19 over 900m, 6 len behind Buffalo Rise with 53kg at $5.80. First up last campaign second of 12 at this track May 14 over 900m, 0.8 len behind Kannon Mikazuki carrying 53kg at $20.50. Anticipate a bold showing.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. At the latest run held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at this track on March 5 over 900m, 1.75 len behind Tony Prince carrying 56kg at $2.70. Before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 12 at this track on February 3 over 900m, 5.5 len behind Crystallize with 56kg at $2.30. Close to a win. Should run well again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 9 at this track on March 5 over 900m, 2 len behind Tony Prince carrying 55kg at $7.70. Previously second-up ran last of 16 at Kyoto on November 23 over 1200m, 10 len behind Uncle Cross with 58.0kg at $452.80. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last campaign got back early 6th of 12 at this track on February 3 over 900m, 6 len behind Crystallize with 56kg at $273.70. form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run came from midfield and won by a head at this track March 5 over 900m defeating Crystallize carrying 56kg at $4.70. The race before that won by a neck at this track February 4 over 900m defeating Tsutsu Uraura carrying 56kg at $1.90. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 5th of 9 at this track on March 5 over 900m, 5 len behind Tony Prince carrying 56kg at $33.90. Second run from a spell 3rd of 12 at Urawa on March 19 over 800m, 3 len behind Crystallize with 56kg at $21.20. Rates highly and is among the main hopes.
